# Wordie Digital — AI Content Map

## Purpose
Wordie is an Australian digital agency specialising in design-led WordPress development, powered by AI-enhanced workflows. The site showcases Wordie's services, work portfolio, process, and technology stack, and is the primary lead generation vehicle for the agency. Target audience: marketing managers, startup founders, and business leaders looking for a premium WordPress partner.

## Content Model

### Blocks (ACF Gutenberg)

| Block slug      | Purpose                                                        | Key fields                                    |
|-----------------|----------------------------------------------------------------|-----------------------------------------------|
| hero-banner     | Full-viewport dark-teal hero section                          | heading (H1), subheading, cta_primary, cta_secondary, background_image |
| client-logos    | Kicker text + scrolling marquee of client logos               | kicker_text, logos (repeater: logo_image, logo_name, logo_link) |
| services-grid   | Section header + 3-column bordered service cards              | section_kicker, section_heading, services (repeater: service_title, service_description, service_link) |
| work-section    | Featured project carousel with stats panel + thumbnail row    | section_kicker, section_heading, section_cta, projects (repeater: project_image, project_client_logo, project_title, project_link, project_stats (repeater: stat_value, stat_label), project_description, project_tags) |
| why-wordie      | Dark two-column section — heading/intro left, numbered reasons right | section_kicker, section_heading, section_description, reasons (repeater: reason_title, reason_description) |
| cta-banner      | Dark-grey banner with rounded bottom corners and dual CTA buttons    | section_heading, section_description, cta_primary, cta_secondary |
| tech-stack      | Centred header + 3-col platform cards + supporting stack logo row    | section_kicker, section_heading, section_description, platforms (repeater: platform_logo, platform_name, platform_description), supporting_label, supporting_logos (repeater: logo_image, logo_alt) |
| process-steps   | Left-aligned header + horizontal steps row with dashed left borders  | section_kicker, section_heading, steps (repeater: step_title, step_description) |
| testimonial     | Two-column testimonial carousel — quote/author left, portrait right  | testimonials (repeater: client_logo, author_image, quote, author_name, author_title) |
| bottom-cta      | Dark-teal panel with rounded top corners, connects flush to footer   | section_heading, section_description, trust_line, cta_primary, cta_secondary |

### Options Pages (Global / Sitewide)

| Options page          | Fields                                                |
|-----------------------|-------------------------------------------------------|
| Navigation Settings   | site_logo, nav_cta (link)                             |
| Footer Settings       | footer_phone, footer_email, footer_address, social_linkedin, social_instagram, footer_copyright |

### Custom Post Types
None registered in v1.0. Blog posts use the core `post` type.

## Key URLs
- Homepage: /
- Blog: /blog/
- Contact: /contact/
- AI site map: /wp-json/ai/v1/site-map
- AI content model: /wp-json/ai/v1/content-model
- AI single page: /wp-json/ai/v1/page/{id}

## Data Source Rules
- All structured content is served via ACF fields — no content is hardcoded in templates.
- Global/shared content (logo, nav CTA, footer contact) is served from ACF Options Pages.
- REST endpoints at /wp-json/ai/v1/* return clean JSON of all ACF field output.

## Design Tokens (from Figma cUj0E1fwR3TZOm9hOnmdJ1)
- Primary colour: #F5634D (Wordie Coral)
- Background dark: #0A3542 (Wordie Dark Teal)
- Background light: #F6F9F9 (Wordie White)
- Text headers: #062028
- Text body: #505c5f
- Heading font: Montserrat Bold
- Body font: Open Sans Regular
- Desktop H1: 48px, line-height 1.2
- CTA border-radius: 12px

## Tech Stack
- WordPress 6.x
- PHP 8.2
- ACF Pro (Flexible Content + Options Pages)
- No page builders — custom Gutenberg blocks only
- Hosting: WP Engine
- Deployments: GitHub → WP Engine via GitHub Actions
